title: Prism's Light
description: Instantly brighten dark caves in Minecraft by pressing P for easier mining and exploration.
body:
# ✨ Prism's Light

> Turn the deepest caves from **dark ➜ bright** with a single key press.

**Prism's Light** is a lightweight quality-of-life mod for Minecraft that lets players instantly brighten dark caves by pressing **P**. No more spamming torches everywhere — just press a key and explore clearly.

Perfect for miners, explorers, and players who love underground adventures.

![w](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f8d9830bae16496b6aaf5ca4ebe50e48c8f1564_0.webp)

---

# 🌟 Features

* 🔦 **Instant Cave Lighting**
  * Press **P** to transform caves from **dark ➜ bright** instantly.

* ⛏ **Better Mining Visibility**
  * Easily see ores, tunnels, and hidden paths underground.

* ⚡ **Lightweight & Optimized**
  * Very small mod with minimal performance impact.

* 🎮 **Simple Toggle System**
  * Press **P** anytime to toggle lighting while exploring.

* 🧠 **Smart Cave Detection**
  * Lighting effect works best in dark underground environments.

* 🛠 **Customizable Keybind**
  * The keybind can be changed in the **Controls Menu**.

[image]

---

# ⌨ Default Keybind

| Key | Action |
|----|----|
| **P** | Toggle Cave Light |

You can change the key in **Minecraft Controls Settings**.

---

# ⭐ Why Use Prism's Light?

Caves in Minecraft are often **too dark**, making exploration frustrating.  
**Prism's Light** removes that frustration and lets you focus on **exploring, mining, and surviving**.

Whether you're hunting for **diamonds**, exploring **deep caves**, or building **underground bases**, this mod makes the experience much smoother.

[image]

---

# 🚀 Future Ideas

* 🌈 Adjustable brightness levels  
* 🔘 Custom toggle key  
* 🔦 Dynamic lighting improvements  
* ⚙ Configuration options
